name: Your Last Words (Shinobu Kocho)
description:
A deadly blow is done upon you, and during your last moments of life, you've been given the chance of saying your farewells to someone you love... What do you say?

Fandom: Kimetsu No Yaiba (Demon Slayer)

Artist: Anime

(ANGST SERIES: "Your Last Words")

(I've been wondering myself, what would you say to your favorite character during those "Heroic Moments" where you save their lives at the cost of your own? Well, I don't know what you would say, but let's see how they would reply, shall we?)

Please favorite and leave a feedback to support my work. For further information, check my profile.
